description: Fragment of a letter from Ḥayyim b. 'Ammār al-Madīnī, probably from Palermo, to Barhun b. Ishaq al-Tāhartī, Qayrawan. Around 1045. Information about civil rebellion in Palermo and details about goods in Sicily: figs, pepper, wheat, and barley. (Information from Gil, Kingdom, Vol. 4, #648) VMR
